name: Data Management
description: Create custom datasets, edit tables with typed columns, and build interactive charts — bar, line, area, and pie. Import and export CSV too.
details:
Build your own tables from scratch: text, number, and date columns, tag any row with a name and color, then chart the result.

Charts support bar, line, area, pie, and donut, grouped by any column or by tag, aggregated as sum/average/count/min/max, and filtered by date range — handy for something like tracking income sources and seeing which one earned the most over the last month. CSV import and export round it out.
